heading: Chairman and Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff
label: 413 Chairman and Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff
text: The Chairman and Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff are entitled to the allowances provided by law for the Chief of Staff of the Army.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)41310:142(d) (less applicability to basic pay).[None.]
Amendments1987—, in amending section generally, in section catchline inserted “and Vice Chairman”, and in text inserted “and Vice Chairman” and substituted “are” for “is”.Pub. L. 100–180
